name: Malay Spiced Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 piece fresh ginger root - 3/4 inch long, peeled
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry with paper towels.
2. Cut the chicken crosswise into 1/2 inch wide strips.
3. Chop the onions, garlic, and ginger.
4. Combine cumin, nutmeg, turmeric, cinnamon, red pepper, and cloves in a separate bowl.
5. Heat a wok over medium heat until warm.
6. Add the spice mixture; cook and stir until lightly toasted and fragrant.
7. Increase the heat to high.
8. Drizzle oil into the wok and heat for 30 seconds.
9. Add onions, garlic, ginger, and lemon peel; stir-fry for about 5 minutes or until lightly browned.
10. Add chicken and spice mixture; stir-fry until the chicken is no longer pink in the center and is coated with the spice mixture.
11. Stir in water, sugar, vinegar, and salt. Bring to a boil.
12. Stir until half the liquid evaporates and the mixture thickens.
13. Spoon the chicken mixture over rice.
